Description: Epic for setting up core backend infrastructure including API server, database, and development environment
Acceptance Criteria: All backend infrastructure components are operational and ready for development

Description: Epic for implementing complete authentication and authorization system with JWT and RBAC
Acceptance Criteria: Authentication system is complete with all roles and permissions

Description: Epic for building advanced scheduling capabilities including conflict detection, availability, and optimization
Acceptance Criteria: Advanced scheduling features enhance the scheduling workflow

Description: Epic for implementing multi-channel notification system (email, SMS, push)
Acceptance Criteria: Users receive timely notifications through their preferred channels

Description: Epic for building comprehensive reporting and analytics features
Acceptance Criteria: Users can generate and export detailed reports

Description: Epic for implementing Progressive Web App features and mobile optimization
Acceptance Criteria: Application works offline and provides mobile-native experience

Description: Epic for comprehensive testing strategy and quality assurance
Acceptance Criteria: Application meets quality standards with 80%+ test coverage

Description: Epic for setting up CI/CD, monitoring, and production deployment

Summary: Set up Node.js + Express + TypeScript backend
Description: Initialize backend API server with Node.js, Express, and TypeScript configuration. Set up project structure with proper folder organization (routes, controllers, services, models).
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Backend server runs on localhost:3000
2. TypeScript compilation works without errors
3. Basic /health endpoint returns 200 OK
4. Environment variables configured
5. ESLint and Prettier configured

Summary: Set up PostgreSQL database with Prisma ORM
Description: Install and configure PostgreSQL database. Set up Prisma ORM with initial schema and migrations.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. PostgreSQL database is running locally
2. Prisma schema file created
3. Database connection successful
4. Prisma Client generates without errors
5. Initial migration applied

Description: Implement Organizations (tenants) table schema and CRUD API endpoints for multi-tenant support.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Organizations table created with schema
2. GET /organizations endpoint returns organizations
3. POST /organizations creates new organization
4. PUT /organizations/:id updates organization
5. Data validation implemented

Description: Build JWT-based authentication system with access and refresh tokens. Create middleware for token verification.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. JWT tokens generate on login
2. Access token expires after 15 minutes
3. Refresh token expires after 7 days
4. Middleware validates tokens correctly
5. Invalid tokens return 401 error

Summary: Create User registration and login endpoints
Description: Implement user registration (signup) and login endpoints with password hashing using bcrypt.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. POST /auth/register creates new user
2. POST /auth/login returns JWT tokens
3. Passwords hashed with bcrypt (10 rounds)
4. Email validation prevents duplicates
5. Input validation with Zod schema

Summary: Set up development environment with Docker
Description: Create Docker Compose file for local development with PostgreSQL, Redis, and backend services.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Docker Compose file runs all services
2. Database persists data in volumes
3. Hot reload works for backend code
4. Environment variables loaded from .env
5. Documentation updated

Description: Create centralized error handling middleware with proper error codes and logging.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. All errors caught by middleware
2. Consistent error response format
3. Error logging with Winston
4. 4xx and 5xx errors handled properly
5. Stack traces in development only

Summary: Add input validation with Zod schemas
Description: Implement Zod validation schemas for all API request bodies and query parameters.
Acceptance Criteria:
1. Zod schemas created for all endpoints
2. Invalid input returns 400 with details
3. Type-safe validation with TypeScript
4. Validation errors are descriptive

Summary: Implement Users table and CRUD API

2. GET /users returns paginated users
3. GET /users/:id returns user details
4. PUT /users/:id updates user
5. DELETE /users/:id soft deletes user
